## 摘要 · Summary

简要说明面向用户的变更及其必要性；如有对应 Issue，请链接。
Describe the user-facing change and why it is needed. Link the related Issue when one exists.

## 验证 · Verification

- [ ] 我已运行相关的离线 e2e，并在下方记录命令和输出。 / I ran the relevant offline e2e test(s) and recorded the command/output below.
- [ ] 对于可观察行为变更，我已新增或更新 e2e 覆盖。 / I updated or added e2e coverage for every externally observable behavior change.
- [ ] 我已确认不包含密钥、token、个人数据、生成的运行态文件或无关改动。 / I checked that no keys, tokens, personal data, generated runtime state, or unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] 我保留了离线优先、clean-room 与 Windows 10/11 约束。 / I preserved the project's offline-first, clean-room, and Windows 10/11 constraints.
- [ ] 我已在需要时更新面向用户的文档。 / I updated user-facing documentation when needed.

```text
粘贴验证输出 / Paste verification output here.
```

## 给审阅者的说明 · Notes for reviewers

请说明兼容性、安全、打包或后续事项。中文和英文都欢迎。
Call out compatibility, security, packaging, or follow-up considerations. Chinese and English are both welcome.
